CONTRACT ERRORS.AUTOMATIC DESC: It is not possible to select 'Tour creation' while 'Automatic' is deselected.
CONTRACT ERRORS.TOUR CREATION REQUIRED DESC: It is not possible to deselect 'DIY' and 'Automatic' at the same time.
CONTRACT ERRORS.DIY CHECKED ERROR: Unfortunately, assigning a DIY contract is not possible for companies that are created after September 12, 2023, as we no longer offer this type of contract since that date.

REACHED.TITLE: Contingent reached
REACHED.DESC:
Your current contingent has been reached ({{ count }}/{{ max }} slots).

To remain flexible, you can still record the 360° tour and commission us. We will create the tour as usual.

In the meantime, you have the option to speak with our Success Team about an upgrade or to free up slots by deleting tours that are no longer needed.

Important: As soon as you free up contingent again through an upgrade or by deleting tours that are no longer needed, the new tour can be activated & the created floor plans, photos, videos, and other content can be used.
REACHED.ERROR: Your current contingent has been reached ({{ count }}/{{ max }} slots). Please contact us for an upgrade or delete existing tours to proceed.
